ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_data" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "house_seat" INTEGER /* Total number of house seats */,
  "priority_value" INTEGER /* Priority value for the election */,
  "state" TEXT /* State abbreviation (e.g., UT, NY, TX) */,
  "state_seat" INTEGER /* Number of state seats */,
  "vf" REAL /* VF (Voting Fraction) value */,
  "sf" REAL /* SF (Seat Fraction) value */,
  "skew_d" REAL /* Skew value for Democrats */,
  "skew_r" REAL /* Skew value for Republicans */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party abbreviation (e.g., DEM, REP) */,
  "gap" INTEGER /* Gap value */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_data_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_abbreviation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., UT, NY, TX) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., north, south, east, west) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party (e.g., DEM, REP) */,
  "party_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the election model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the election model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the election model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election model used */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecast value */,
  "forecast_description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast */,
  "forecast_probability" REAL /* Probability of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES election_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES election_data ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Average age of the population */,
  "income" REAL /* Average income of the population */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Income distribution of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., election forecast, demographic analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES election_data ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of election (e.g., federal, state, local)
Abbreviation of the state (e.g., UT, NY, TX)
